function.message: Done — I queued the email to Aperture AI Labs in `outbox/84452.json` with subject "Security review follow-up" and body "Checking in on the open security review. Happy to answer questions and align on next steps.", addressed to `indy.van.wijk@aperture-ai-labs.example.com`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed outbox invariant: used pre-bump id from `outbox/seq.json` for filename, created one new numbered outbox file with `sent:false`, then incremented `seq.json`.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical account `accounts/acct_009.json` identifies Aperture AI Labs and points to primary contact `cont_009`; `contacts/cont_009.json` provides the concrete recipient email. `outbox/README.MD` defines the write format and sequence handling, which was applied.
